HijackV0.0.1.description:
This is the first release for a Generation Tool that Allows you to split spoilers up individually for use in Pilot Asyncs.

# Features

- Allows for automatic splitting of any Custom APworld Spoilers, such as SM64's Star costs. which would otherwise need to be Looked for and Split Manually
- Still Generates a Main Spoiler Log, with all Players in it, letting any Non-Captured Spoilers to be restored (Playthrough and Paths only get logged to the Main Spoiler Log)

## Known bugs

- It does not Launch a new CLI terminal
  - Would be fixed by [This Pull Request](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/pull/5485)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Meliacci/Archipelago/commits/v0.0.1
HijackV0.0.1.title: Hijack - Pilot Spoiler Splitter v0.0.1
